primary_reading_goal: Recover alkaloid treatment levels, whether levels span natural nectar concentrations, bumblebee response units, alternative-flower context, and numerically usable contrasts.
do_not_infer: Do not treat a context-dependent behavioral response as pollen transfer or plant fitness without a reported outcome.

taxon: Cinnyris talatala; Pycnonotus tricolor; Zosterops virens
primary_reading_goal: Recover nicotine dose scale, sucrose treatments, species-specific feeding-frequency and feeding-duration units, replication, and independently analyzable contrasts.
do_not_infer: Do not pool feeding behavior across bird species or sucrose contexts before verifying the experimental unit and shared panel structure.

primary_reading_goal: Separate field and laboratory contrasts; classify each dose as natural-range, within-natural-range, or supra-natural; recover bumblebee visitation and time-per-flower data with denominator and variance.
do_not_infer: Do not average natural-range and supra-natural dose effects or combine visits with time-per-flower as one outcome.

primary_reading_goal: Recover zygacine exposure design, biologically relevant dose evidence, naïve-generalist foraging response, sample size, and the separation between controlled assay and field visitor observations.
do_not_infer: Do not recode the controlled generalist-bee deterrence assay as a whole-community visitation effect or a reproductive fitness effect.
